B) Fusion of two nuclei
C) Fusion of two plasma membranes
D) All of these
Paragraph - 2.3.4
Deuteromycetes
116. Which of the following is false about
deuteromycetes? (Pg. 24, E)
A) They reproduce only by asexual spores
(conidia)
B) Mycelium is branched and septate
C) They have only parasitic forms
D) They have no sexual stage (perfect
stage)
117. Which of the following is correct about
class Deuteromycetes? (Pg. 24, E)
A) Some members are saprophytes or
parasites
B) A large number of members are
decomposers of litter and help in
mineral cycling
C) Alternaria, Colletotrichum and
Trichoderma are deuteromycetes
D) All
118. Sexual reproduction is found in all except
- (Pg. 24, E)
A) Deuteromycetes
B) Ascomycetes
C) Phycomycetes
D) Basidiomycetes
119. If sexual stage is discovered in a member
of deuteromycetes, it is moved to-
(Pg. 24, E)
A) Phycomycetes
B) Basidiomycetes
C) Ascomycetes
D) Both band ¢
Diagram Based Questions
120. Identify the diagram. (Pg. 23, E)
«> ag
g i
om iy [0]
121. Identify the diagram. (Pg. 21, E)
